'''Gorgano IV''' was the [[Emperor (Tapani)|Emperor]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. The [[Gorgano IV Museum]], in the Historical District of [[Estalle Island]] on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]], was named after the former Emperor.<ref name="LOTE" />

{{Char-stub}}
